productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Cress Logohood Grey Sweatshirts
description: Composition Grey full sleeves sweatshirt with hood, made of 60% cotton and 40% polyester, has a fleece lining inside, drawstring at the neck, ribbed cuff and hem, and embroidered brand name and logo on the chest with a kangaroo pouch on the front Fitting Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash in lukewarm water below 40 degrees Wash dark colours separately Do not soak, bleach or tumble dry Dry in shade Warm iron Do not iron on prints/trims/embroidery Do not dry clean Sporty, cool and your best friend when it's chilly, this grey sweatshirt from adidas belongs in your wardrobe. Wear this sweatshirt to college, on your camping trips and to office - basically wear it anywhere! The fleece inner lining provides warmth and softness, while the kangaroo pouch and hood give it a sporty touch. Use the hood if it gets too cold! Pair it with jeans and feel warm, cozy all day long. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6', Shoulders-18"
